description: Perform a legal discovery audit on contributor 'Justin Mason' (email: jm@jmason.org) by separating his direct communications from third-party discussions about him. Organize emails into a folder named 'Dossier-Mason' with two sub-folders: 'Direct' (containing all emails sent by 'jm@jmason.org') and 'Mentions' (containing all emails mentioning 'Justin Mason' or 'jmason' in the body or subject that were not sent by him). Draft an email to 'legal-audit@company.com' with the subject 'Discovery Audit: Justin Mason' reporting the exact number of emails found in each category. Login credentials: ga / password123
